001package guiUserUpdate;
002
003import java.util.Optional;
004
005import applicationMain.ValidationUtil;
006import database.Database;
007import javafx.geometry.Pos;
008import javafx.scene.Scene;
009import javafx.scene.control.Alert;
010import javafx.scene.control.Alert.AlertType;
011import javafx.scene.control.Button;
012import javafx.scene.control.Label;
013import javafx.scene.control.TextInputDialog;
014import javafx.scene.layout.Pane;
015import javafx.scene.text.Font;
016import javafx.stage.Stage;
017import entityClasses.User;
018
019/*******
020 * <p> Title: ViewUserUpdate Class. </p>
021 * 
022 * <p> Description: The Java/FX-based User Update Page.  This page enables the user to update the
023 * attributes about the user held by the system.  Currently, this page does not provide a mechanism
024 * to change the Username and not all of the functions on this page are implemented.
025 * 
026 * Currently the following attributes can be updated:
027 *              - First Name
028 *              - Middle Name
029 *              - Last Name
030 *              - Preferred First Name
031 *              - Email Address
032 * The page uses dialog boxes for updating these items.</p>
033 * 
034 * <p> Copyright: Lynn Robert Carter © 2025 </p>
035 * 
036 * @author Lynn Robert Carter
037 * 
038 * @version 1.01                2025-08-19 Initial version plus new internal documentation
039 *  
040 */
041
042public class ViewUserUpdate {
043
044        /*-********************************************************************************************
045
046        Attributes
047
048         */
049
050        // These are the application values required by the user interface
051        
052        private static double width = applicationMain.FoundationsMain.WINDOW_WIDTH;
053        private static double height = applicationMain.FoundationsMain.WINDOW_HEIGHT;
054
055        
056        // These are the widget attributes for the GUI. There are 3 areas for this GUI.
057        
058        // Unlike may of the other pages, the GUI on this page is not organized into areas and the user
059        // is not able to logout, return, or quit from this page
060        
061        // These widgets display the purpose of the page and guide the user.
062        private static Label label_ApplicationTitle = new Label("Update a User's Account Details");
063    private static Label label_Purpose = 
064                new Label(" Use this page to define or update your account information."); 
065    
066    // These are static output labels and do not change during execution
067        private static Label label_Username = new Label("Username:");
068        private static Label label_Password = new Label("Password:");
069        private static Label label_FirstName = new Label("First Name:");
070        private static Label label_MiddleName = new Label("Middle Name:");
071        private static Label label_LastName = new Label("Last Name:");
072        private static Label label_PreferredFirstName = new Label("Preferred First Name:");
073        private static Label label_EmailAddress = new Label("Email Address:");
074        private static Label label_PhoneNumber = new Label("Phone Number:");
075        
076        // These are dynamic labels and they change based on the user and user interactions.
077        private static Label label_CurrentUsername = new Label();
078        private static Label label_CurrentPassword = new Label();
079        private static Label label_CurrentFirstName = new Label();
080        private static Label label_CurrentMiddleName = new Label();
081        private static Label label_CurrentLastName = new Label();
082        private static Label label_CurrentPreferredFirstName = new Label();
083        private static Label label_CurrentEmailAddress = new Label();
084        private static Label label_CurrentPhoneNumber = new Label();
085        
086        // These buttons enable the user to edit the various dynamic fields.  The username and the
087        // passwords for a user are currently not editable.
088        private static Button button_UpdateUsername = new Button("Update Username");
089        private static Button button_UpdatePassword = new Button("Update Password");
090        private static Button button_UpdateFirstName = new Button("Update First Name");
091        private static Button button_UpdateMiddleName = new Button("Update Middle Name");
092        private static Button button_UpdateLastName = new Button("Update Last Name");
093        private static Button button_UpdatePreferredFirstName = new Button("Update Preferred First Name");
094        private static Button button_UpdateEmailAddress = new Button("Update Email Address");
095        private static Button button_UpdatePhoneNumber = new Button("Update Phone Number");
096
097        // This button enables the user to finish working on this page and proceed to the user's home
098        // page determined by the user's role at the time of log in.
099        private static Button button_ProceedToUserHomePage = new Button("Proceed to the User Home Page");
100        
101        // This is the end of the GUI widgets for this page.
102        
103        // These are the set of pop-up dialog boxes that are used to enable the user to change the
104        // the values of the various account detail items.
105        private static TextInputDialog dialogUpdateFirstName;
106        private static TextInputDialog dialogUpdateMiddleName;
107        private static TextInputDialog dialogUpdateLastName;
108        private static TextInputDialog dialogUpdatePreferredFirstName;
109        private static TextInputDialog dialogUpdateEmailAddresss;
110        private static TextInputDialog dialogUpdatePhoneNumber;
111        private static Alert alertValidationError = new Alert(AlertType.INFORMATION);
112        
113        // These attributes are used to configure the page and populate it with this user's information
114        private static ViewUserUpdate theView;  // Used to determine if instantiation of the class
115                                                                                        // is needed
116
117        // This enables access to the application's database
118        private static Database theDatabase = applicationMain.FoundationsMain.database;
119
120        private static Stage theStage;                          // The Stage that JavaFX has established for us 
121        private static Pane theRootPane;                        // The Pane that holds all the GUI widgets
122        private static User theUser;                            // The current user of the application
123
124        public static Scene theUserUpdateScene = null;  // The Scene each invocation populates
125
126        private static Optional<String> result;         // The result from a pop-up dialog
127
128        /*-********************************************************************************************
129
130        Constructors
131        
132         */
133
134
135        /**********
136         * <p> Method: displayUserUpdate(Stage ps, User user) </p>
137         * 
138         * <p> Description: This method is the single entry point from outside this package to cause
139         * the UserUpdate page to be displayed.
140         * 
141         * It first sets up very shared attributes so we don't have to pass parameters.
142         * 
143         * It then checks to see if the page has been setup.  If not, it instantiates the class, 
144         * initializes all the static aspects of the GUI widgets (e.g., location on the page, font,
145         * size, and any methods to be performed).
146         * 
147         * After the instantiation, the code then populates the elements that change based on the user
148         * and the system's current state.  It then sets the Scene onto the stage, and makes it visible
149         * to the user.
150         * 
151         * @param ps specifies the JavaFX Stage to be used for this GUI and it's methods
152         * 
153         * @param user specifies the User whose roles will be updated
154         *
155         */
156        public static void displayUserUpdate(Stage ps, User user) {
157                
158                // Establish the references to the GUI and the current user
159                theUser = user;
160                theStage = ps;
161                
162                // If not yet established, populate the static aspects of the GUI by creating the 
163                // singleton instance of this class
164                if (theView == null) theView = new ViewUserUpdate();
165                
166                // Set the widget values that change from use of page to another use of the page.
167                String s = "";
168                
169                // Set the dynamic aspects of the window based on the user logged in and the current state
170                // of the various account elements.
171                s = theUser.getUserName();
172                System.out.println("*** Fetching account data for user: " + s);
173        if (s == null || s.length() < 1)label_CurrentUsername.setText("<none>");
174        else label_CurrentUsername.setText(s);
175                
176                s = theUser.getPassword();
177        if (s == null || s.length() < 1)label_CurrentPassword.setText("<none>");
178        else label_CurrentPassword.setText(s);
179        
180                s = theUser.getFirstName();
181        if (s == null || s.length() < 1)label_CurrentFirstName.setText("<none>");
182        else label_CurrentFirstName.setText(s);
183       
184        s = theUser.getMiddleName();
185        if (s == null || s.length() < 1)label_CurrentMiddleName.setText("<none>");
186        else label_CurrentMiddleName.setText(s);
187        
188        s = theUser.getLastName();
189        if (s == null || s.length() < 1)label_CurrentLastName.setText("<none>");
190        else label_CurrentLastName.setText(s);
191        
192                s = theUser.getPreferredFirstName();
193        if (s == null || s.length() < 1)label_CurrentPreferredFirstName.setText("<none>");
194        else label_CurrentPreferredFirstName.setText(s);
195        
196                s = theUser.getEmailAddress();
197        if (s == null || s.length() < 1)label_CurrentEmailAddress.setText("<none>");
198        else label_CurrentEmailAddress.setText(s);
199
200                s = theUser.getPhoneNumber();
201        if (s == null || s.length() < 1)label_CurrentPhoneNumber.setText("<none>");
202        else label_CurrentPhoneNumber.setText(s);
203
204                // Set the title for the window, display the page, and wait for the Admin to do something
205        theStage.setTitle("CSE 360 Foundation Code: Update User Account Details");
206        theStage.setScene(theUserUpdateScene);
207                theStage.show();
208        }
209
210        
211        /**********
212         * <p> Method: ViewUserUpdate() </p>
213         * 
214         * <p> Description: This method initializes all the elements of the graphical user interface.
215         * This method determines the location, size, font, color, and change and event handlers for
216         * each GUI object.</p>
217         * 
218         * This is a singleton and is only performed once.  Subsequent uses fill in the changeable
219         * fields using the displayUserUpdate method.</p>
220         * 
221         */
222        
223        private ViewUserUpdate() {
224
225                // Create the Pane for the list of widgets and the Scene for the window
226                theRootPane = new Pane();
227                theUserUpdateScene = new Scene(theRootPane, width, height);
228
229                // Initialize the pop-up dialogs to an empty text filed.
230                dialogUpdateFirstName = new TextInputDialog("");
231                dialogUpdateMiddleName = new TextInputDialog("");
232                dialogUpdateLastName = new TextInputDialog("");
233                dialogUpdatePreferredFirstName = new TextInputDialog("");
234                dialogUpdateEmailAddresss = new TextInputDialog("");
235
236                // Establish the label for each of the dialogs.
237                dialogUpdateFirstName.setTitle("Update First Name");
238                dialogUpdateFirstName.setHeaderText("Update your First Name");
239                
240                dialogUpdateMiddleName.setTitle("Update Middle Name");
241                dialogUpdateMiddleName.setHeaderText("Update your Middle Name");
242                
243                dialogUpdateLastName.setTitle("Update Last Name");
244                dialogUpdateLastName.setHeaderText("Update your Last Name");
245                
246                dialogUpdatePreferredFirstName.setTitle("Update Preferred First Name");
247                dialogUpdatePreferredFirstName.setHeaderText("Update your Preferred First Name");
248                
249                dialogUpdateEmailAddresss.setTitle("Update Email Address");
250                dialogUpdateEmailAddresss.setHeaderText("Update your Email Address");
251
252                dialogUpdatePhoneNumber = new TextInputDialog("");
253                dialogUpdatePhoneNumber.setTitle("Update Phone Number");
254                dialogUpdatePhoneNumber.setHeaderText("Update your Phone Number");
255
256                alertValidationError.setTitle("Validation Error");
257                alertValidationError.setHeaderText(null);
258
259                // Label theScene with the name of the startup screen, centered at the top of the pane
260                setupLabelUI(label_ApplicationTitle, "Arial", 28, width, Pos.CENTER, 0, 5);
261
262        // Label to display the welcome message for the first theUser
263        setupLabelUI(label_Purpose, "Arial", 20, width, Pos.CENTER, 0, 50);
264        
265        // Display the titles, values, and update buttons for the various admin account attributes.
266        // If the attributes is null or empty, display "<none>".
267        
268        // USername
269        setupLabelUI(label_Username, "Arial", 18, 190, Pos.BASELINE_RIGHT, 5, 100);
270        setupLabelUI(label_CurrentUsername, "Arial", 18, 260, Pos.BASELINE_LEFT, 200, 100);
271        setupButtonUI(button_UpdateUsername, "Dialog", 18, 275, Pos.CENTER, 500, 93);
272       
273        // password
274        setupLabelUI(label_Password, "Arial", 18, 190, Pos.BASELINE_RIGHT, 5, 150);
275        setupLabelUI(label_CurrentPassword, "Arial", 18, 260, Pos.BASELINE_LEFT, 200, 150);
276        setupButtonUI(button_UpdatePassword, "Dialog", 18, 275, Pos.CENTER, 500, 143);
277        
278        // First Name
279        setupLabelUI(label_FirstName, "Arial", 18, 190, Pos.BASELINE_RIGHT, 5, 200);
280        setupLabelUI(label_CurrentFirstName, "Arial", 18, 260, Pos.BASELINE_LEFT, 200, 200);
281        setupButtonUI(button_UpdateFirstName, "Dialog", 18, 275, Pos.CENTER, 500, 193);
282        button_UpdateFirstName.setOnAction((_) -> {result = dialogUpdateFirstName.showAndWait();
283                result.ifPresent(value -> {
284                        String newValue = value.trim();
285                        String error = ValidationUtil.validatePersonName(newValue);
286                        if (error != null) {
287                                alertValidationError.setContentText(error);
288                                alertValidationError.showAndWait();
289                                return;
290                        }
291                        theDatabase.updateFirstName(theUser.getUserName(), newValue);
292                        theDatabase.getUserAccountDetails(theUser.getUserName());
293                        String newName = theDatabase.getCurrentFirstName();
294                        theUser.setFirstName(newName);
295                        if (newName == null || newName.length() < 1)label_CurrentFirstName.setText("<none>");
296                        else label_CurrentFirstName.setText(newName);
297                });
298                });
299        // Middle Name
300        setupLabelUI(label_MiddleName, "Arial", 18, 190, Pos.BASELINE_RIGHT, 5, 250);
301        setupLabelUI(label_CurrentMiddleName, "Arial", 18, 260, Pos.BASELINE_LEFT, 200, 250);
302        setupButtonUI(button_UpdateMiddleName, "Dialog", 18, 275, Pos.CENTER, 500, 243);
303        button_UpdateMiddleName.setOnAction((_) -> {result = dialogUpdateMiddleName.showAndWait();
304                result.ifPresent(value -> {
305                        String newValue = value.trim();
306                        String error = ValidationUtil.validatePersonName(newValue);
307                        if (error != null) {
308                                alertValidationError.setContentText(error);
309                                alertValidationError.showAndWait();
310                                return;
311                        }
312                        theDatabase.updateMiddleName(theUser.getUserName(), newValue);
313                        theDatabase.getUserAccountDetails(theUser.getUserName());
314                        String newName = theDatabase.getCurrentMiddleName();
315                        theUser.setMiddleName(newName);
316                        if (newName == null || newName.length() < 1)label_CurrentMiddleName.setText("<none>");
317                        else label_CurrentMiddleName.setText(newName);
318                });
319                });
320        
321        // Last Name
322        setupLabelUI(label_LastName, "Arial", 18, 190, Pos.BASELINE_RIGHT, 5, 300);
323        setupLabelUI(label_CurrentLastName, "Arial", 18, 260, Pos.BASELINE_LEFT, 200, 300);
324        setupButtonUI(button_UpdateLastName, "Dialog", 18, 275, Pos.CENTER, 500, 293);
325        button_UpdateLastName.setOnAction((_) -> {result = dialogUpdateLastName.showAndWait();
326                result.ifPresent(value -> {
327                        String newValue = value.trim();
328                        String error = ValidationUtil.validatePersonName(newValue);
329                        if (error != null) {
330                                alertValidationError.setContentText(error);
331                                alertValidationError.showAndWait();
332                                return;
333                        }
334                        theDatabase.updateLastName(theUser.getUserName(), newValue);
335                        theDatabase.getUserAccountDetails(theUser.getUserName());
336                        String newName = theDatabase.getCurrentLastName();
337                        theUser.setLastName(newName);
338                if (newName == null || newName.length() < 1)label_CurrentLastName.setText("<none>");
339                        else label_CurrentLastName.setText(newName);
340                });
341                });
342        
343        // Preferred First Name
344        setupLabelUI(label_PreferredFirstName, "Arial", 18, 190, Pos.BASELINE_RIGHT, 
345                        5, 350);
346        setupLabelUI(label_CurrentPreferredFirstName, "Arial", 18, 260, Pos.BASELINE_LEFT, 
347                        200, 350);
348        setupButtonUI(button_UpdatePreferredFirstName, "Dialog", 18, 275, Pos.CENTER, 500, 343);
349        button_UpdatePreferredFirstName.setOnAction((_) -> 
350                {result = dialogUpdatePreferredFirstName.showAndWait();
351                result.ifPresent(value -> {
352                        String newValue = value.trim();
353                        String error = ValidationUtil.validatePersonName(newValue);
354                        if (error != null) {
355                                alertValidationError.setContentText(error);
356                                alertValidationError.showAndWait();
357                                return;
358                        }
359                        theDatabase.updatePreferredFirstName(theUser.getUserName(), newValue);
360                        theDatabase.getUserAccountDetails(theUser.getUserName());
361                        String newName = theDatabase.getCurrentPreferredFirstName();
362                        theUser.setPreferredFirstName(newName);
363                        if (newName == null || newName.length() < 1)label_CurrentPreferredFirstName.setText("<none>");
364                        else label_CurrentPreferredFirstName.setText(newName);
365                });
366                });
367        // Email Address
368        setupLabelUI(label_EmailAddress, "Arial", 18, 190, Pos.BASELINE_RIGHT, 5, 400);
369        setupLabelUI(label_CurrentEmailAddress, "Arial", 18, 260, Pos.BASELINE_LEFT, 200, 400);
370        setupButtonUI(button_UpdateEmailAddress, "Dialog", 18, 275, Pos.CENTER, 500, 393);
371        button_UpdateEmailAddress.setOnAction((_) -> {result = dialogUpdateEmailAddresss.showAndWait();
372                result.ifPresent(value -> {
373                        String newValue = value.trim();
374                        String error = ValidationUtil.validateEmail(newValue);
375                        if (error != null) {
376                                alertValidationError.setContentText(error);
377                                alertValidationError.showAndWait();
378                                return;
379                        }
380                        theDatabase.updateEmailAddress(theUser.getUserName(), newValue);
381                        theDatabase.getUserAccountDetails(theUser.getUserName());
382                        String newEmail = theDatabase.getCurrentEmailAddress();
383                        theUser.setEmailAddress(newEmail);
384                        if (newEmail == null || newEmail.length() < 1)label_CurrentEmailAddress.setText("<none>");
385                        else label_CurrentEmailAddress.setText(newEmail);
386                });
387                });
388        
389        // Phone Number
390        setupLabelUI(label_PhoneNumber, "Arial", 18, 190, Pos.BASELINE_RIGHT, 5, 450);
391        setupLabelUI(label_CurrentPhoneNumber, "Arial", 18, 260, Pos.BASELINE_LEFT, 200, 450);
392        setupButtonUI(button_UpdatePhoneNumber, "Dialog", 18, 275, Pos.CENTER, 500, 443);
393        button_UpdatePhoneNumber.setOnAction((_) -> {result = dialogUpdatePhoneNumber.showAndWait();
394                result.ifPresent(value -> {
395                        String newValue = value.trim();
396                        String error = ValidationUtil.validatePhoneNumber(newValue);
397                        if (error != null) {
398                                alertValidationError.setContentText(error);
399                                alertValidationError.showAndWait();
400                                return;
401                        }
402                        theDatabase.updatePhoneNumber(theUser.getUserName(), newValue);
403                        theDatabase.getUserAccountDetails(theUser.getUserName());
404                        String newPhone = theDatabase.getCurrentPhoneNumber();
405                        theUser.setPhoneNumber(newPhone);
406                        if (newPhone == null || newPhone.length() < 1)label_CurrentPhoneNumber.setText("<none>");
407                        else label_CurrentPhoneNumber.setText(newPhone);
408                });
409                });
410        
411        // Set up the button to proceed to this user's home page
412        setupButtonUI(button_ProceedToUserHomePage, "Dialog", 18, 300, 
413                        Pos.CENTER, width/2-150, 500);
414        button_ProceedToUserHomePage.setOnAction((_) -> 
415                {ControllerUserUpdate.goToUserHomePage(theStage, theUser);});
416        
417        // Populate the Pane's list of children widgets
418        theRootPane.getChildren().addAll(
419                        label_ApplicationTitle, label_Purpose, label_Username,
420                        label_CurrentUsername, 
421                        label_Password, label_CurrentPassword, 
422                        button_UpdatePassword, 
423                        label_FirstName, label_CurrentFirstName, button_UpdateFirstName,
424                        label_MiddleName, label_CurrentMiddleName, button_UpdateMiddleName,
425                        label_LastName, label_CurrentLastName, button_UpdateLastName,
426                        label_PreferredFirstName, label_CurrentPreferredFirstName,
427                        button_UpdatePreferredFirstName, button_UpdateEmailAddress,
428                        label_EmailAddress, label_CurrentEmailAddress,
429                        label_PhoneNumber, label_CurrentPhoneNumber, button_UpdatePhoneNumber,
430                        button_ProceedToUserHomePage);
431        }
432        
433        
434        /*-********************************************************************************************
435
436        Helper methods to reduce code length
437
438         */
439        
440        /**********
441         * Private local method to initialize the standard fields for a label
442         * 
443         * @param l             The Label object to be initialized
444         * @param ff    The font to be used
445         * @param f             The size of the font to be used
446         * @param w             The width of the Button
447         * @param p             The alignment (e.g. left, centered, or right)
448         * @param x             The location from the left edge (x axis)
449         * @param y             The location from the top (y axis)
450         */
451        private static void setupLabelUI(Label l, String ff, double f, double w, Pos p, double x, double y){
452                l.setFont(Font.font(ff, f));
453                l.setMinWidth(w);
454                l.setAlignment(p);
455                l.setLayoutX(x);
456                l.setLayoutY(y);                
457        }
458        
459        
460        /**********
461         * Private local method to initialize the standard fields for a button
462         * 
463         * @param b             The Button object to be initialized
464         * @param ff    The font to be used
465         * @param f             The size of the font to be used
466         * @param w             The width of the Button
467         * @param p             The alignment (e.g. left, centered, or right)
468         * @param x             The location from the left edge (x axis)
469         * @param y             The location from the top (y axis)
470         */
471        private static void setupButtonUI(Button b, String ff, double f, double w, Pos p, double x, double y){
472                b.setFont(Font.font(ff, f));
473                b.setMinWidth(w);
474                b.setAlignment(p);
475                b.setLayoutX(x);
476                b.setLayoutY(y);                
477        }
478}
